info.name: Verboheit MLC API
info.description: A comprehensive Postman collection for testing the Verboheit Math League Competition (VMLC) API, separated by user roles (Candidate and Staff).

info.name: Verboheit MLC API
info.description: A comprehensive Postman collection for testing the Verboheit Math League Competition (VMLC) API, separated by user roles (Candidate and Staff).

request.description: Checks if the API service is up and running. Should return a 200 OK with `{"status": "healthy"}`.
Gets the registration status of the platform.
Authenticate as a candidate and receive access and refresh tokens. The `candidateAccessToken` and `candidateRefreshToken` will be automatically saved to collection variables.
Authenticate as a staff member and receive access and refresh tokens. The `staffAccessToken` and `staffRefreshToken` will be automatically saved to collection variables.
Blacklists the user's refresh token to log them out.
Obtain a new access token using a valid refresh token.
Get the verification status for a specific user (requires manager+ role).
Lists all user verification requests for administrative review (requires manager+ role).
Approves a user's verification request (requires manager+ role).
Rejects a user's verification request with an optional reason (requires manager+ role).
Downloads a specific verification document for a given user (requires manager+ role).

item.name: Broadcast Management

response.name: Successful List Broadcasts Response

request.description: Requires `manager` or higher role. Creates a new broadcast and queues it for sending. This will trigger a real-time notification for connected clients.

response.name: Successful Create Broadcast Response
response.body:
{
    "id": 2,
    "task_id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-1234-567890abcdef",
    "subject": "New Exam Available",
    "message": "The final stage exam is now open. Good luck!",
    "created_by": { "...": "..." },
    "created_at": "2025-09-21T12:00:00Z",
    "status": "pending",
    "mediums": ["email", "platform"],
    "target_roles": {
        "staff": ["volunteer", "moderator"],
        "candidate": ["final"]
    },
    "logs": []
}

item.description: Endpoints for creating and managing broadcasts to users.
